title: Document Freshness Metadata
description: YAML frontmatter schema for tracking documentation freshness

last_reviewed.description: ISO 8601 date of last human review (YYYY-MM-DD)

owner.description: GitHub handle or team responsible for this doc

code_refs.description: Code files this doc describes (for change detection)

stale_after_days.description: Days until this doc is considered stale

auto_generated.description: If true, doc is generated from code and drift is expected
